official_public_docs_or_observed_endpoin: Observed SAP SuccessFactors/SAP HR Cloud recruiting HTML or jobs API.
source_discovery_method: extract tenant, site, portal, or requisition API identifiers from configured company URL
list_fetch_method: bounded API request to candidate/search endpoint through source runner
detail_fetch_method: detail fetch only when list response lacks geo/date/remote and parser certification covers detail shape
pagination_method: use documented limit/offset/cursor; stop on empty page, error, or job budget
canonical_url_rule: use source canonical/apply URL, absolutize relative URLs, strip tracking noise, and keep stable path identity
source_job_id_rule: list-payload: Use requisition, item, vacancy, or URL id.
title_company_rule: reject rows missing title, company context, or usable canonical/apply URL; reject placeholders and blank titles
location_text_rule: list-payload: Candidate/search APIs usually expose structured or labeled location fields.
country_region_city_rule: list-payload: Candidate/search APIs usually expose structured or labeled location fields.
remote_type_rule: pending-research: Remote/workplace semantics vary by vendor and need raw fixture proof.
posting_date_rule: list-payload: Use product-specific posted date fields only when source exposes them.
rate_limit: conservative tenant-level budget, per-host serialization, retry/backoff on 429/5xx

quality_threshold.public_write_rule: source canary only; public writes require raw parser fixture, expected normalized fixture, and passing parser tests

quarantine_reason: hold/quarantine recommendation: missing strict raw parser fixture; source id reliability unproven/weak; canonical URL reliability unproven

parser_method.path: server/index.js SAP HR Cloud HTML/API parsers

runner_interface.writeAccepted: source runner accepted path updates public read model only after validation
runner_interface.writeQuarantine: source runner quarantine path records reason and keeps row out of public index

next_action: add saved raw response fixture, expected normalized fixture, invalid-shape rejection test
certification_blockers: missing strict raw parser fixture; source id reliability unproven/weak; canonical URL reliability unproven
